name: TRIAL-BRAIN-000-baseline
hypothesis: GKX big-three via shallow GBM ranker on microcap-tilted EODHD 2017+ panel survives 25bps costs
expected_effect: 0-60 bps/mo excess vs universe EW; Sharpe 0.3-0.8 if real
kill_condition: Arm A |t|>=3 = pipeline leak (void all); Arm B t<1 = reject; survivorship gap > half edge = reject

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-001-baseline-clean
hypothesis: Same as BRAIN-000 on the corrected universe definition: major-exchange common stock, impossible returns nulled
expected_effect: 0-60 bps/mo excess; net Sharpe 0.3-0.8 if real
kill_condition: Arm A |t|>=3 = leak (void); Arm B t<1 = reject; coverage gap > half edge = reject

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-002-crsp-holdband
hypothesis: GKX big-three + 30% hold band on survivorship-free CRSP 2002-2024 survives 25bps net
expected_effect: +10-50 bps/mo net excess; Sharpe 0.4-0.9 if real
kill_condition: noise GROSS |t|>=3 = leak void; Arm B net t<1 = reject; post-2015 t<0.5 = decayed, no promotion

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-003-opportunistic-insider
hypothesis: Opportunistic (non-routine) insider open-market purchases (code P), traded at filing date, microcap-tilted, hold-banded, survive 25bps net on CRSP 2004-2024
expected_effect: Arm B +20-70 bps/mo net excess, Sharpe 0.3-0.8; Arm A routine ~0 (placebo)
kill_condition: noise gross |t|>=3 = leak void; routine t>=2 & within 0.5t of opp = confound; opp net t<1 = reject; opp post-2015 t<0.5 = decayed

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-004-pead-sue
hypothesis: PEAD/SUE (analyst + time-series) top quintile, enter day after rdq, 3mo hold, cap-segment, survives 25bps net on CRSP 2006-2024
expected_effect: Arm B marginal; micro>large; Arm B-A spread the direct PEAD test
kill_condition: noise gross|t|>=3 void; B net t<1 both segs reject; B-A spread t<1 no drift

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-005-revisions
hypothesis: Analyst revision momentum (IBES statpers) top quintile, hold-band, cap-segment, incremental over SUE, survives 25bps net
kill_condition: noise gross|t|>=3 void; B net t<1 both segs reject; not incremental to SUE flagged redundant

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-007-fusion
hypothesis: Equal-weight composite of surviving signals, large/mid, top-quintile, hold-band, no return-fit weights
expected_effect: fusion beats singles if signals diversify
kill_condition: noise gross|t|>=3 void; composite net t<1 reject; no beat over best single flagged

name: TRIAL-FACTORY-EXPLORE-B1
hypothesis: META-TRIAL (explore tier): 20 price/volume signals x 2 cap segments scanned on CRSP 2004-2018 explore window; hypothesis GENERATION only, confirm window 2019-2024 untouched
expected_effect: 0-3 graduates at t_net>=1.5 & t_ic>=2.0 in largemid; explore numbers never quoted as performance
kill_condition: n/a (meta-trial). Confirm-stage DSR must deflate by n_candidates=40. Contaminated refs (mom_12_1, st_reversal, vol_6m, illiq) cannot graduate.

name: TRIAL-FACTORY-EXPLORE-B2
hypothesis: META-TRIAL (explore tier): 10 annual-Compustat quality/value/investment signals x 2 segments on CRSP explore window 2004-2018 via PIT FundStore (6mo lag, 18mo staleness); confirm 2019-2024 untouched
expected_effect: literature prior: profitability/issuance/accruals are the net-of-cost survivor class; 1-4 graduates plausible at t_net>=1.5 & t_ic>=2.0 largemid
kill_condition: n/a (meta-trial). Cumulative explore candidates now 60 -> confirm-stage DSR deflates by 60. Zero graduates = valid result.

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-008-grossprof-small
hypothesis: Small-cap (dollar-vol ranks 1001-3000) gross profitability (Novy-Marx GP/AT, PIT 6mo lag) top decile w/ 30pct hold-band survives 50bps one-way on HELD-OUT 2019-01..2024-12
expected_effect: +10-25 bps/mo net excess vs small EW; power note: expected t~1.2 over 72mo at explore effect size
kill_condition: KILL if net excess<=0 or IC<=0; PASS needs t_net>=0.8 AND t_ic>=1.5 (STRONG >=1.5); DSR reported at n_trials=61; PASS -> forward paper clock only, never arms

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-008-EXT
hypothesis: gp-small (frozen BRAIN-008 mechanics, 50bps) earns positive net excess on the 1963-2001 extension panel (test months 1970-2001, thin early months skip via min-names guard)
expected_effect: literature prior (Novy-Marx sample 1963-2010): positive; +10-30 bps/mo plausible
kill_condition: reading rule only (cannot promote/demote 008): SUPPORTIVE if net>0 and t_ic>=1.5; UNDERMINING if net<=0; informs forward-lane prior

name: TRIAL-FACTORY-EXPLORE-B3A
hypothesis: META-TRIAL (explore tier): 8 alt-data signals (daily-agg upgrades, SI change, 13F breadth, rec momentum, congress hist, gemini composite) x 2 segments; congress-dependent signals on 2014-2018 only (stated a priori)
expected_effect: daily-agg upgrades may beat monthly proxies; congress expected weak post-disclosure; gemini composite = the pushback instrument
kill_condition: n/a (meta-trial). Cumulative explore candidates now 77 -> confirm DSR deflates by 77. Short-window signals flagged low-power (60 months).

name: TRIAL-FACTORY-EXPLORE-B3B
hypothesis: META-TRIAL (explore tier): customer momentum (Cohen-Frazzini, 343k segment links, name-matched), 13F best-ideas top-3 count, price-target upside x 2 segments on 2004-2018
expected_effect: customer momentum = the strongest published economic-links effect; best-ideas positive prior; tgt_upside weak/biased prior

name: TRIAL-FACTORY-EXPLORE-B3C
hypothesis: META-TRIAL: tgt_upside_low (long near-target names, the 3b mirror as a NEW candidate) + best_ideas_frac (top-3 holders / total breadth) x 2 segments
expected_effect: tgt_upside_low strong prior from 3b sign; best_ideas_frac refines a real IC

name: VOID-TGT-UPSIDE-B3B-B3C
hypothesis: ANNOTATION: both tgt_upside (B3B) and tgt_upside_low (B3C) runs VOID — IBES ptgdet value is split-adjusted through download date vs nominal CRSP prc -> future-split look-ahead (long book tgt/price~0.02). No target-price reading stands until adjustment-matched rebuild (needs ibes.adj).
kill_condition: candidates remain counted (88) for DSR honesty; the t=7.12 line is a bug alarm, not a result

name: TRIAL-BRAIN-006-fda-approval-drift
hypothesis: Long-only calendar-time portfolio of stocks with an ORIGINAL NDA/BLA approval in month t, entered month t+1 (announcement month excluded), held 3 months, earns positive net-of-cost drift vs industry-matched EW benchmark on CRSP 2002-2024; effect expected concentrated in small caps / PRIORITY reviews
expected_effect: weak-positive at best (~35/65 against): approval-day repricing + AdCom/PDUFA anticipation likely absorb the news; BRAIN-004 PEAD precedent says gross drift dies net of costs
kill_condition: noise-arm gross |t|>=3 voids; Arm B net t<1 in BOTH cap segments AND B-PRI net t<1 -> REJECT; <600 matched in-panel events caps verdict at insufficient-coverage; deploy gate t>3.4 & DSR>=0.95 & PBO<0.5

name: ANNOTATION-BRAIN-006-CROSSWALK-V2
note: Post-run agent-verified crosswalk correction (APIL=P&G/Warner-Chilcott not Allergan; Tolmar pre-2004=Atrix ATRX; Journey=FBIO/DERM; 5 date fixes). Book delta 15/671 events (2.2%); verdict REJECT stands per one-run rule; crosswalk v2 = artifact of record for future registrations.

name: TRIAL-THEME-SUPPLY-supplier-baskets
hypothesis: Suppliers of strong customers (salecs-weighted 12-1 customer momentum, annual June formation, 12-month hold) earn positive net excess vs the supplier universe on explore 2004-2018 - the SLOW basket arm of the suppliers thesis (fast cust_mom arm already REJECT in 3b)
expected_effect: weak (~30/70 against): monthly IC was t 1.6-1.8; annual cadence removes turnover drag but loses timeliness; Madsen anticipation effects pre-price links
kill_condition: noise gross |t|>=3 voids; B net t<1 both segments -> REJECT closes the basket arm; spread t<1 -> no info at annual cadence; PASS (net t>=1.5 + spread t>=1) earns ONE separately-registered confirm on 2019-2024; cumulative explore candidates 88+2=90

name: TRIAL-FACTORY-EXPLORE-B5
hypothesis: Batch 5: 15 winner-picking signals (interactions, streaks, quarterly PIT, 13F duration/persistence, dNOA) - frozen list + directions + priors in docs/STRATEGY_FACTORY.md before any scan
expected_effect: priors per replication sweep: 3 strong-ish, 6 medium, 3 weak, 3 dead (scanned for the receipt); Chen-Velikov ~4bps/mo net hurdle recorded
kill_condition: frozen graduation rule (largemid t_net>=1.5 AND t_IC>=2.0, top-5 cap); explore window hard-stop 2018-12; cumulative candidates 90+30=120

name: INSTR-HOLD-HORIZON
hypothesis: Measurement only: BRAIN-007 composite net performance vs hold-band {1,3,6,12,24}mo under otherwise byte-identical spec - answers holding-horizon question as a curve; prior: near-flat net 3-24mo with falling turnover (NMV banding + quality slow decay)
expected_effect: reported only; never arms or retunes a lane; SMQ refresh stays frozen per TRIAL-SMQ-FWD
kill_condition: none (instrument); 5 configs recorded in the honesty ledger
